Triangula is a catgirl. She represents lambda and is the link between [[Esther]] and [[Andromeda]]

She represents the Triangulum Galaxy<!-- native american anime catgirl wearing a green sweater made of yarn, green hair, green eyes -->

[[File:Triangula.png|thumb|Triangula]]
[[Category:Gaiad characters]]
[[sn:Triangula]][[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
